title: Evangelion Bodily Functions
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Bodily Functions             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Jul 24, 2008 8:40 pm This is my first topic, so bare with me..... If evangelion are just like humans, with organs and all, how do their bodily functions work? They are in all that armor so, how would they relieve themselves? Before that, do they have to eat or consume anything to stay the way they are? Are the fed nutrients through LCL or intravenously when not in use? Are they even still alive when not in use? Please, help me answer these questions.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Jul 24, 2008 10:20 pm Well, I don't think they have to be fed or anything, seeing as they run on electric power, so I assume they stay alive using electricity for their metabolism. I think they're also stored in cryostasis between use, so they're pretty much in suspended animation unless they're used. Also, after Unit-01 eats Zeruel's S2 engine, theoretically, it can be powered by that as well, although it is still hooked up to the electricity until End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Thu Jul 24, 2008 10:33 pm Considering that, their medical technology must be nothing short of phenomenal. To keep a creature like that alive using nothing but electricity, and the ability to put them in stasis when not in use? That isn't something real science will be able to do for many decades yet. Although, that might be a given when you take into account the fact that they can reattach any limb, even the head. And the fact that they can construct them in the first place, apparently assembling them from scratch as opposed to growing them. (Which would be almost as impressive anyway.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Thu Jul 24, 2008 10:59 pm Post-19: Eva-01 runs on its own shit. The electricity is just for show. Pre-19: The Eva had never ingested anything, therefore had no need to shit. Its mechanical parts gave its biological parts the kickstart to move, but it required an assload of electricity to move, thus the time limit. (Just guessing on that bit)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:23 am Then what is the point of evas having any organs in the first place??? You can clearly see 02's in EoE, and Eva 01 eats Zeruel. I know it was ingesting the S^2, but it had to go to the stomach first. This is all very confusing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:31 am It wouldn't be much of a clone if it didn't have the organs. It wasn't like "HAY WE'RE MAKING GIANT ROBOTS. LET'S PUT ORGANS IN THEM! LOL" They took the already cloned Adam/Lilith, and fucked with it to make it an Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:32 am They're modified clones which were grown, so I'd say the people in charge were more of the attitude of, don't remove it unless it's a problem. Or maybe they did remove them, but they kept regenerating back so they gave up. Edit: Sachi beat me to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:38 am Well then, I guess this is the eva universe we are talking about, so technology is obviously way more advanced than it is now. So there probably is some new tech. that that can allow a "living" thing to remain in suspended animation for extended periods of time without any bad repercussions, like joint failure or decomposition.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:42 am Odd then that they never use this amazing medical tech on anything but the Evas. Like when Touji looses a leg. Unit 02 can have its head reattached, but they can't reattach a limb on an ordinary human being?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:44 am Only unless they clone Toji can they preform a feat of medical magic like the such. Also....I am not an embryo anymore!!! WOOT!

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:45 am IIRC, they replace the Evas arms with modular spares.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:47 am When is that mentioned????

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 25, 2008 12:48 am Action_Bastard wrote: Then what is the point of evas having any organs in the first place???

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:00 am I don't what they are feeding them, but I'm guessing its not as tasty as Zerul.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:10 am Formless_One wrote: Odd then that they never use this amazing medical tech on anything but the Evas. Like when Touji looses a leg. Unit 02 can have its head reattached, but they can't reattach a limb on an ordinary human being?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:21 am Reichu wrote: Formless_One wrote: Odd then that they never use this amazing medical tech on anything but the Evas. Like when Touji looses a leg. Unit 02 can have its head reattached, but they can't reattach a limb on an ordinary human being?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 25, 2008 1:55 am Formless One wrote: That might explain how they regenerate, at least unit 01. When its battling Zerul its armor binders get demolished, so its free to reattach its arm of its own accord.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jul 25, 2008 2:01 am Reichu wrote: Well, she could have used her prog knife as a utensil and attempted something resembling table manners anyway... Yui's behavior stands as a testament to why people should not be decked out in high-tech bondage gear and forced to spend almost all of their time in giant refrigerators being utterly deprived of everything required to maintain sanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 25, 2008 2:15 am TO tally different topic, if you really want to go there. Also, my comment was sort of made in jest. And sort of not.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jul 25, 2008 2:22 am Reichu wrote: TO tally different topic, if you really want to go there.
